sqlMap.select: select * from CorpCommBusinessLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and CCBKey = #CCBKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into CorpCommBusinessLW(CCBKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey CCBCheckedValue CCBCommentDesc LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#CCBKey:NUMERIC#, #VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #CCBCheckedValue# #CCBCommentDesc# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select CCBCheckedValue, CCBCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CCBKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from CorpCommBusinessLW where CCBKey = #CCBKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update CorpCommBusinessLW set
CCBCheckedValue = #CCBCheckedValue# CCBCheckedValue = null CCBCommentDesc = #CCBCommentDesc# CCBCommentDesc = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where CCBKey = #CCBKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from CorpCommBusinessLW where CCBKey = #CCBKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from CorpCommBusinessLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and CCBKey = #CCBKey#
sqlMap.select: select CCBCheckedValue, CCBCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, CCBKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from CorpCommBusinessLW where CCBKey = #CCBKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select CCBKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, CCBCheckedValue, CCBCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from CorpCommBusinessLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and CCBKey = #CCBKey#
